result:
## Trace: `fork`/`clone` syscalls ‚Üí `copy_process()`

Graph confidence throughout: `cscope` (0.90). Both `sys_fork` and `sys_clone` are macro-expanded via `SYSCALL_DEFINE*`, so ccodegraph shows them as `SYSCALL_DEFINE0`/`SYSCALL_DEFINE5` nodes bound to their expansion site ‚Äî verified directly against source.

### Path A: `fork` syscall
1. **`SYSCALL_DEFINE0(fork)`** ‚Äî `kernel/fork.c:2991` (guarded by `#ifdef __ARCH_WANT_SYS_FORK` / `CONFIG_MMU`)
   ‚Üí calls `kernel_clone(&args)` at `kernel/fork.c:2998`
2. **`kernel_clone`** ‚Äî defined `kernel/fork.c:2868`
   ‚Üí calls `copy_process(NULL, trace, NUMA_NO_NODE, args)` at `kernel/fork.c:2909`
3. **`copy_process`** ‚Äî defined `kernel/fork.c:2240`

### Path B: `clone` syscall
1. **`SYSCALL_DEFINE5(clone, ...)`** (or the `SYSCALL_DEFINE6` variant under `CONFIG_CLONE_BACKWARDS3`) ‚Äî signature site depends on config: `kernel/fork.c:3020` (`CONFIG_CLONE_BACKWARDS`), `:3025` (`CONFIG_CLONE_BACKWARDS2`), `:3030` (`CONFIG_CLONE_BACKWARDS3`, `SYSCALL_DEFINE6`), or `:3036` (default); shared body starts `kernel/fork.c:3041`, guarded by `#ifdef __ARCH_WANT_SYS_CLONE`
   ‚Üí calls `kernel_clone(&args)` at `kernel/fork.c:3052`
2. **`kernel_clone`** ‚Äî defined `kernel/fork.c:2868`
   ‚Üí calls `copy_process(NULL, trace, NUMA_NO_NODE, args)` at `kernel/fork.c:2909`
3. **`copy_process`** ‚Äî defined `kernel/fork.c:2240`

### Shared intermediate helper
Both paths funnel through **`kernel_clone()`** (`kernel/fork.c:2868‚Äì2953`) ‚Äî it is the single choke point that calls `copy_process()` exactly once, at `kernel/fork.c:2909`. `ccodegraph callers copy_process` confirms only two direct callers in the whole graph: `kernel_clone` (line 2909) and `fork_idle` (line 2828, unrelated idle-thread path, not part of either syscall).

`ccodegraph callers kernel_clone` cross-checks all four `SYSCALL_DEFINE*` call sites (`:2998` for `fork`, `:3014` for `vfork`, `:3052` for `clone`, `:3210` for `clone3`) ‚Äî confirming `fork` and `clone` both route through `kernel_clone` and nowhere else before reaching `copy_process`.
